intro:
I couldn't find any information on "Veronica subfulvida". However, I can provide information on Veronica, a genus of plants commonly known as speedwells, and one of its species, Veronica officinalis.

Veronica is a genus of flowering plants in the family Plantaginaceae. They are annual or perennial herbs with a long history of use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Veronica species, such as Veronica officinalis, include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various conditions, including wounds and respiratory issues. 

The bioactive constituents of Veronica species include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to their medicinal properties. 

The most common herbal preparations made with Veronica species include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
